div1.entryFree:
Diminish, vb. trans. 1) to lessen: Err. II, 2, 130. As V, 4, 145. Lr. IV, 6, 19.
2) to take from in a hurtful manner, to injure: if springing things be any jot --ed, they wither in their prime, Ven. 417. your swords may as well wound the loud winds as d. one dowle that's in my plume, Tp. III, 3, 64.
